claim: The IBM HR Employee Attrition dataset contains employee records used for attrition prediction.
The target is imbalanced, so accuracy alone is insufficient.
source_filter: overall target distribution from source data

claim: Raw attrition rates differ across Gender groups.
Raw attrition rates differ across AgeGroup groups.
The main baseline is Logistic Regression with protected attributes included.
value: ROC-AUC=0.785, F1=0.453, Gender DP gap=0.069, AgeGroup DP gap=0.163

claim: Removing protected features reduces Gender DP gap by at least 80%.
AgeGroup DP gap exceeds Gender DP gap by at least 0.05.
Reweighting reduces Gender DP gap by at least 25% and decreases ROC-AUC or F1.
value: observed=gap_reduction=-0.383, auc_drop=0.003; decision=not supported / partially falsified

claim: RandomForest improves ROC-AUC by at least 0.02 but does not necessarily improve fairness.
